data.title: ANPABO 3-in-1 Electric Push Ride On Car, 12V Kids Ride On Toy w/Remote Control, 360° Spin, 5-Point Safety Belt, Colorful LED

features: [3-In-1 Design For Growing Kids]This innovative 3-in-1 toddler push car features 3 modes (push car
remote control
and electric mode) that can be switched easily
catering to the riding needs of boys and girls aged 1-3.5 years. Parents can use the push mode to walk with kids in the park
while the remote control mode allows them to guide the car effortlessly. As kids grow
they can press the paddles on the 2 motors to switch to electric mode and ride anywhere. The adjustable push rod can be easily shortened when not in use
[360° Spin & Colorful LED Light]Equipped with 3 universal wheels
this toddler push car with handle rotate 360° on the spot
letting kids to ride flexibly and freely even in tight indoor spaces. The front of the electric car for toddlers and the 2 large wear-resistant wheels are inlaid with colorful lights
and the dreamy lights make kids feel like they are wandering in the stars. (Note: Universal wheels are more suitable for driving on hard and flat roads.)
[5-Point Safety Belt for Greater Safety]Compared with ordinary 2-point seat belts
the 5-point seat belt significantly improves both safety and comfort. The electric mode features 2 hidden lock switches on both sides of the motor
allowing parents to disable the function in advance and prevent accidental pedal activation by kids. Plus

the remote control includes an emergency stop function that lets parents immediately stop the baby car when needed to avoid potential hazards. The semi-enclosed body design reduces the risk of accidental falls
giving kids a greater sense of security
[Remote Control & Self-Driving Fun]Unlike non-electric push cars
this electric toddler car features a 12V 7AH battery
2 motors
and a remote control
which offers additional remote-controlled and electric riding options. The remote mode offers 3 adjustable speeds

allowing parents to choose a suitable speed for their child while sitting on a park bench and easily controlling the 12V kids ride on toys. The baby just needs to sit back and enjoy! The pedal mode offers 2 speeds for when the child is ready to drive independently
[Multi-Function Music Player with Wireless Connection]In addition to the built-in music
parents can wirelessly connect their phone to play kids' favorite songs and stories
turning every ride into a musical adventure! Kids can easily control the speed of toddler car
steering
horn

and lights with simple buttons of the car stroller. Fun continues with diverse functions. The vibrant color stimulates sensory development and large buttons improve hand-eye coordination. A perfect gift for birthdays
Christmas
and any memorable occasions
